<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ja">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>LΩPARA – RISE TO BIGCAT</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Big+Shoulders+Display:wght@700;800;900&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;700&family=DM+Mono:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300&family=Noto+Sans+JP:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg:      #f7f7f7;
  --surface: #ffffff;
  --ink:     #0a0a0a;
  --blue:    #2020cc;
  --blue2:   #1818aa;
  --sub:     #666;
  --rule:    rgba(10,10,10,0.1);
  --hi:      #d4ff00;
  --font-d:  'Big Shoulders Display', sans-serif;
  --font-m:  'DM Mono', monospace;
  --font-b:  'Space Grotesk', 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body {
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--ink);
  font-family: var(--font-b);
  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

/* ══ BLUEPRINT DOT GRID ══ */
body::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed; inset: 0;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle, rgba(32,32,204,0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 24px 24px;
  pointer-events: none; z-index: 0;
}

/* ══ HEADER ══ */
header {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 300;
  height: 52px;
  display: flex; align-items: stretch;
  background: var(--surface);
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--ink);
}
.header-logo-wrap {
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--rule);
  gap: 0.6rem;
}
.hdr-cross {
  width: 14px; height: 14px;
  position: relative; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.hdr-cross::before, .hdr-cross::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  background: var(--blue);
}
.hdr-cross::before { width: 1px; height: 100%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
.hdr-cross::after  { width: 100%; height: 1px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); }
.logo {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--ink);
}
.logo span { color: var(--blue); }

.header-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.55rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sub);
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--rule);
}

nav {
  display: flex; align-items: stretch; margin-left: auto;
}
nav a {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sub);
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  padding: 0 1.2rem;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--rule);
  transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
}
nav a:hover { background: var(--blue); color: #fff; }

/* ══ TOP BAR ══ */
.top-stripe {
  position: fixed; top: 52px; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 299;
  height: 6px;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    -45deg,
    var(--blue) 0px, var(--blue) 6px,
    transparent 6px, transparent 12px
  );
  opacity: 0.35;
}

/* ══ HERO ══ */
#hero {
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  padding: 58px 0 0;
  background: var(--bg);
  min-height: 100svh;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
}

/* コーナーブラケット */
.corner-tl, .corner-tr, .corner-bl, .corner-br {
  position: absolute;
  width: 20px; height: 20px;
  z-index: 2;
}
.corner-tl { top: 64px; left: 1.5rem;
  border-top: 1.5px solid var(--blue); border-left: 1.5px solid var(--blue); }
.corner-tr { top: 64px; right: 1.5rem;
  border-top: 1.5px solid var(--blue); border-right: 1.5px solid var(--blue); }
.corner-bl { bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(--blue); border-left: 1.5px solid var(--blue); }
.corner-br { bottom: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(--blue); border-right: 1.5px solid var(--blue); }

.hero-sys-bar {
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 2rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  gap: 1.5rem;
}

/* ══ INLINE COUNTDOWN ══ */
.inline-cd {
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  gap: 0;
  margin-left: auto;
}
.inline-cd-label {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--sub);
  margin-right: 1rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.inline-cd-unit {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--rule);
}
.inline-cd-num {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1;
  color: var(--blue);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}
.inline-cd-num.tick { color: var(--ink); }
.inline-cd-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.4rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--sub);
  margin-top: 0.15rem;
}
.sys-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue);
}
.sys-tag.muted { color: var(--sub); }
.sys-divider { width: 1px; height: 12px; background: var(--rule); }
.sys-bar-fill { flex: 1; }
/* バーコード風装飾 */
.barcode-deco {
  display: flex; gap: 2px; align-items: center;
}
.barcode-deco span {
  display: block;
  width: 2px;
  background: var(--ink);
  opacity: 0.2;
}

.hero-main {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem 2rem;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  position: relative;
}

/* 斜め装飾ライン */
.hero-main::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; right: 2rem;
  width: 1px; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--rule) 0%, transparent 100%);
}

.hero-eyebrow {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.35em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--sub);
  opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.5s 0.1s forwards;
}
.hero-eyebrow::before {
  content: '';
  width: 6px; height: 6px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--blue);
  transform: rotate(45deg);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: clamp(5rem, 16vw, 12rem);
  line-height: 1;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  color: var(--ink);
  opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.6s 0.25s forwards;
}
h1 .ghost {
  display: block;
  color: transparent;
  -webkit-text-stroke: 1.5px var(--ink);
}
h1 .solid { display: block; }
h1 .tagged {
  display: inline-block;
  background: var(--blue);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 0.02em 0.1em;
  -webkit-text-stroke: 0;
  margin-top: 0.05em;
}

.hero-subtitle {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 1.8vw, 1rem);
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: var(--sub);
  font-style: italic;
  opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.6s 0.4s forwards;
}

/* ══ WARNING STRIPE ══ */
.warning-stripe {
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 2rem;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    -45deg,
    var(--blue) 0, var(--blue) 5px,
    transparent 5px, transparent 10px
  );
  opacity: 0.08;
}
.warning-stripe-wrap {
  position: relative;
  opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.5s 0.55s forwards;
}
.warning-label {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  padding: 0 2rem;
  gap: 1rem;
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.4em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue);
}

/* ══ HERO DESC ══ */
.hero-desc-wrap {
  padding: 0 2rem;
  opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.6s 0.65s forwards;
}
.hero-desc-label {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.35em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue);
  display: block; margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
}
.hero-desc {
  font-family: var(--font-b);
  font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 2;
  color: var(--sub);
  max-width: 680px;
}

/* ══ GOAL BLOCK ══ */
.goal-block {
  margin: 0 2rem;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
  background: var(--surface);
  position: relative;
  opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.6s 0.75s forwards;
}
.goal-block::before {
  content: 'GOAL STAGE — TARGET CONFIRMED';
  position: absolute; top: -0.55rem; left: 1rem;
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 0 0.5rem;
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.52rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.goal-inner { padding: 1.5rem; }
.goal-eyebrow {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.4em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--sub);
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}
.goal-title {
  font-family: var(--font-b);
  font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--sub);
  line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.goal-live-title {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2.5vw, 1.6rem);
  color: var(--ink);
  display: block; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.goal-meta-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.gm-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.8rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
}
.gm-item:nth-child(odd)  { padding-right: 1rem; border-right: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.gm-item:nth-child(even) { padding-left: 1rem; }
.gm-item:last-child      { border-bottom: none; }
.gm-key {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.52rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue);
  min-width: 3rem;
}
.gm-val { font-family: var(--font-b); font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--ink); }
.gm-val-venue {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: 1.3rem; color: var(--ink);
}
.gm-venue { align-items: center !important; }

/* チケット */
.goal-tickets {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1px; background: var(--rule);
  border: 1px solid var(--rule);
}
.gt-card { background: var(--surface); padding: 1rem; }
.gt-card.omega {
  background: var(--blue); grid-column: 1 / -1;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: 0 1.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
.gt-card.omega .gt-name { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
.gt-card.omega .gt-perks { grid-column: 2; }
.gt-name {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline;
  color: var(--ink);
}
.gt-card.omega .gt-name { color: var(--hi); margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }
.gt-price { font-family: var(--font-m); font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--sub); font-weight: 400; }
.gt-card.omega .gt-price { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }
.gt-badge {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--blue);
  border: 1px solid var(--blue);
  padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;
  display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.gt-perks { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.35rem; }
.gt-perks li {
  font-family: var(--font-b); font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--sub);
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
}
.gt-perks li::before {
  content: ''; width: 3px; height: 3px;
  background: var(--blue); flex-shrink: 0;
}
.gt-card.omega .gt-perks li { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); }
.gt-card.omega .gt-perks li::before { background: var(--hi); }
.gm-full {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  border-right: none !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
}
.gm-note .gm-val {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: var(--sub);
}

/* シェアボタン */
.share-wrap {
  margin: 1.2rem 2rem 0;
  display: flex;
  opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.5s 0.85s forwards;
}
.share-btn-x {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.4rem;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--ink);
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
  transition: all 0.18s;
}
.share-btn-x:hover { background: var(--ink); color: #fff; }

/* ══ RTB CARD ══ */
.rtb-card {
  margin: 1.2rem 2rem 2rem;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
  background: var(--surface);
  position: relative;
  opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.6s 0.9s forwards;
}
.rtb-card::before {
  content: 'MISSION LOG — CLASSIFIED';
  position: absolute; top: -0.55rem; left: 1rem;
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 0 0.5rem;
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.52rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.rtb-section { padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.rtb-section:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.rtb-label {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.35em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue);
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
}
.rtb-label::before {
  content: ''; width: 5px; height: 5px;
  background: var(--blue);
}
.rtb-overview {
  font-family: var(--font-b);
  font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 2; color: var(--sub);
}
.rtb-codes { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.rtb-code-item {
  display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.8rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
}
.rtb-code-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.rtb-code {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  color: var(--sub); min-width: 5rem;
}
.rtb-code-sub {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: var(--sub); min-width: 3.5rem;
}
.rtb-code-desc {
  font-family: var(--font-b);
  font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--ink);
}
.rtb-code-item.omega {
  background: var(--blue);
  margin: 0 -1.5rem; padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
}
.rtb-code-item.omega .rtb-code { color: var(--hi); }
.rtb-code-item.omega .rtb-code-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }
.rtb-code-item.omega .rtb-code-sub.omega-sub { color: var(--hi); }
.rtb-code-item.omega .rtb-code-desc { color: #fff; font-weight: 500; }

/* ══ HERO BOTTOM BAR ══ */
.hero-bar {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  border-top: 2px solid var(--ink);
  background: var(--surface);
}
.hero-bar-item {
  padding: 0.9rem 1.5rem;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--rule);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem;
}
.hero-bar-item:last-child { border-right: none; }
.hb-label {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue);
}
.hb-val {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--ink);
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

/* ══ COUNTDOWN ══ */
#countdown {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--ink);
  background: var(--ink);
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
#countdown::before {
  content: 'COUNTDOWN INITIATED — TARGET: 2026.10.13';
  position: absolute; top: 0.6rem; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.cd-cell {
  padding: 3rem 1rem 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
}
.cd-cell:last-child { border-right: none; }
.cd-num {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 7vw, 5rem);
  line-height: 1; display: block;
  color: #fff;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}
.cd-num.tick { color: var(--blue); }
.cd-label {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.35em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  display: block; margin-top: 0.5rem;
}

/* ══ SECTION BASE ══ */
section.content {
  max-width: 1080px; margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 4rem 2rem;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
.sec-row {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.8rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--ink);
}
.sec-n {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; color: var(--blue);
}
.sec-t {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink);
}
.sec-row::after {
  content: '';
  margin-left: auto;
  width: 6px; height: 6px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--blue);
  transform: rotate(45deg);
}

/* ══ EVENT INFO ══ */
.event-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 0.6fr;
  gap: 2rem;
}
.event-name {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
  line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; color: var(--ink);
}
.event-name small {
  display: block;
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.38em; font-weight: 400;
  letter-spacing: 0.3em; color: var(--sub);
  text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}
.meta-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
.meta-table tr { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.meta-table tr:last-child { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.meta-table td { padding: 0.8rem 0; font-family: var(--font-b); font-size: 0.85rem; }
.meta-table .key {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.52rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue);
  width: 5rem; vertical-align: top; padding-top: 0.9rem;
}

/* ══ LINKS ══ */
.link-stack { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.link-row {
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  padding: 0.9rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  text-decoration: none; color: var(--ink);
  transition: padding-left 0.15s;
  position: relative;
}
.link-row:first-child { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.link-row:hover { padding-left: 0.5rem; }
.link-row.primary::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute;
  left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0;
  width: 3px; background: var(--blue);
}
.lr-label {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.52rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em;
  color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase;
  min-width: 4.5rem;
}
.lr-name {
  font-family: var(--font-b);
  font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; flex: 1;
}
.lr-arrow {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--sub);
  opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s;
}
.link-row:hover .lr-arrow { opacity: 1; }

/* ══ SCHEDULE CARDS ══ */
.plan-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 1px; background: var(--rule);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
}
.plan-card {
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.7rem;
  transition: background 0.15s;
  position: relative;
}
.plan-card:hover { background: #f0f0ec; }
.plan-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 2px; background: var(--blue); opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.15s;
}
.plan-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
.pc-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue);
}
.pc-title {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--ink);
  padding-bottom: 0.6rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
}
.pc-rows { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.45rem; }
.pc-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.8rem; }
.pc-month {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--sub);
  min-width: 2rem;
}
.pc-name { font-family: var(--font-b); font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ink); }
.pc-body { font-family: var(--font-b); font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--ink); line-height: 1.8; }

/* ══ MEDIA ══ */
.media-layout {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.8fr 1fr;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
}
.video-cell {
  position: relative; aspect-ratio: 16/9;
  background: var(--ink2, #111);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--rule); overflow: hidden;
}
.video-cell iframe { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; }
.video-ph {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 1rem;
  background: var(--ink); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s;
}
.video-ph:hover { background: #1a1a1a; }
.play-btn {
  width: 48px; height: 48px;
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 0.9rem;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.video-ph:hover .play-btn { border-color: var(--hi); color: var(--hi); }
.video-ph-label {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.track-cell { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.track {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.8rem;
  padding: 0.9rem 1.2rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s;
}
.track:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.track:hover { background: #f0f0ec; }
.tr-n {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.62rem; color: rgba(26,53,204,0.35); min-width: 1.5rem;
}
.track:hover .tr-n { color: var(--blue); }
.tr-info { flex: 1; }
.tr-name { font-family: var(--font-b); font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ink); }
.tr-type { font-family: var(--font-m); font-size: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.22em; color: var(--sub); text-transform: uppercase; }
.tr-play { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--sub); transition: color 0.15s; }
.track:hover .tr-play { color: var(--blue); }

/* ══ PERFORMERS ══ */
.perf-grid {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap;
  border-top: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
  border-left: 1.5px solid var(--ink);
}
.perf-item {
  flex: 1 1 160px;
  padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--rule);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--sub);
  transition: all 0.15s;
}
.perf-item:hover { background: var(--surface); color: var(--ink); }
.perf-item.main {
  background: var(--blue); color: #fff;
  font-family: var(--font-d); font-size: 0.85rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}

/* ══ FOOTER ══ */
footer {
  border-top: 2px solid var(--ink);
  background: var(--surface);
  padding: 1.2rem 2rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
/* WARNING ストライプ */
footer::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    -45deg,
    var(--blue) 0, var(--blue) 4px,
    transparent 4px, transparent 8px
  );
  opacity: 0.3;
}
.f-logo {
  font-family: var(--font-d);
  font-size: 0.95rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--sub);
}
.f-logo span { color: var(--blue); }
.f-copy {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.52rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: #bbb;
}

/* ══ HERO COUNTDOWN BAR ══ */
/* ══ CRT COUNTDOWN ══ */

.crt-tv-wrap {
  position: relative;
  margin: 1.5rem auto 0;
  width: min(700px, 96%);
  transform: rotate(-5deg);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 16px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.55));
}

/* テレビ画像 */
.crt-tv-img {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  display: block;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 3;  /* テレビ画像を前面に */
}

/* 画面エリア（テレビ画像の背面に） */
.crt-bezel {
  position: absolute;
  top: 34.3%;
  left: 18.5%;
  width: 47.0%;
  height: 40.0%;
  border-radius: 14px;
  overflow: hidden;
  z-index: 1;  /* テレビ背面 */
}

.hero-cd-bar {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: transparent;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.hero-cd-bar::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 35% at 28% 18%, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 0%, transparent 55%);
  z-index: 10;
  pointer-events: none;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.crt-canvas {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 8px;
}
.crt-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    0deg,
    transparent,
    transparent 2px,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.08) 2px,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.08) 4px
  );
  pointer-events: none; z-index: 4;
  border-radius: 8px;
}
.crt-content {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  z-index: 5;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.crt-event {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: clamp(0.4rem, 0.85vw, 0.54rem);
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  text-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  text-align: center;
  white-space: normal;
  max-width: 85%;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.crt-nums {
  display: flex; align-items: baseline;
  gap: 0.05em;
  font-family: 'Big Shoulders Display', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 6.5vw, 4.5rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1;
  color: #ffffff;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,0.95),
    0 0 24px rgba(255,255,255,0.35),
    1px 0 0 rgba(200,200,255,0.2),
    -1px 0 0 rgba(255,200,200,0.15);
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}
.crt-sep { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-size: 0.8em; }
.crt-labels {
  display: flex; gap: 0;
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.36rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
}
.crt-label { text-align: center; }
.crt-date {
  font-family: var(--font-m);
  font-size: 0.4rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.hero-cd-info { display: none; }
.hero-cd-units { display: none; }

/* ══ ANIM ══ */
@keyframes fadeIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* ══ RESPONSIVE ══ */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  nav { display: none; }
  .inline-cd-label { display: none; }
  .sys-tag.muted { display: none; }
  .sys-divider { display: none; }
  .event-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .media-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .video-cell { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }
  .goal-meta-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .gm-item:nth-child(odd) { border-right: none; padding-right: 0; }
  .gm-item:nth-child(even) { padding-left: 0; }
  .gm-item:nth-last-child(-n+2) { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }
  .gm-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .goal-tickets { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .gt-card.omega { grid-column: 1; }
  .plan-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-bar { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .hero-bar-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 1/-1; border-right: none; }
  #countdown { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .cd-cell:nth-child(2) { border-right: none; }
  .cd-cell:nth-child(3) { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
}
@media (max-width: 540px) {
  h1 { font-size: clamp(3rem, 16vw, 5rem); }
  .hero-main { padding: 1.5rem 1.2rem; }
  .hero-desc-wrap, .goal-block, .rtb-card, .share-wrap { margin-left: 1.2rem; margin-right: 1.2rem; }
  section.content { padding: 3rem 1.2rem; }
  .hero-bar { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-bar-item { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }
  .hero-bar-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .goal-live-title { font-size: 1.1rem; }
  .gm-val-venue { font-size: 1rem; }
  .hero-cd-bar { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.8rem; }
  .crt-tv-wrap { width: 100%; transform: rotate(-0.8deg); }
  .hero-cd-event { white-space: normal; font-size: 0.75rem; }
  .crt-nums { font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 10vw, 3rem); }
  .crt-event { font-size: clamp(0.35rem, 2vw, 0.48rem); }
  .crt-labels { font-size: clamp(0.28rem, 1.5vw, 0.36rem); }
  .crt-date { font-size: clamp(0.3rem, 1.5vw, 0.4rem); }
  .crt-bezel { top: 34.3%; left: 18.5%; width: 47%; height: 40%; }
  .rtb-code-item { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .rtb-code-item.omega { margin: 0 -1.2rem; padding: 0.65rem 1.2rem; }
  footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; text-align: center; }
  .header-tag { display: none; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="top-stripe"></div>

<header>
  <div class="header-logo-wrap">
    <div class="hdr-cross"></div>
    <a href="#" class="logo">LΩ<span>PARA</span></a>
  </div>
  <div class="header-tag">RISE TO BIGCAT — 2026</div>
  <nav>
    <a href="#event">Event</a>
    <a href="#schedule">Schedule</a>
    <a href="#media">Music</a>
    <a href="#performers">Artists</a>
  </nav>
</header>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="corner-tl"></div>
  <div class="corner-tr"></div>
  <div class="corner-bl"></div>
  <div class="corner-br"></div>

  <div class="hero-sys-bar">
    <span class="sys-tag">SYS // LOPARA.RTB.2026</span>
    <div class="sys-divider"></div>
    <span class="sys-tag muted">STATUS: ACTIVE</span>
    <div class="sys-divider"></div>
    <span class="sys-tag muted">VENUE: OSAKA BIGCAT</span>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-main">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">LΩPARA presents &nbsp;/&nbsp; 2026</p>
    <h1>
      <span class="ghost">RISE TO</span>
      <span class="solid"><span class="tagged">BIGCAT</span></span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">道はない、壁を這い上がるだけだ</p>

    <!-- CRT カウントダウン -->
    <div class="crt-tv-wrap">
      <img class="crt-tv-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="TV">
      <div class="crt-bezel">
        <div class="hero-cd-bar">
          <canvas class="crt-canvas" id="crtCanvas"></canvas>
          <div class="crt-overlay"></div>
          <div class="crt-content">
            <div class="crt-event">LΩPARA 2nd Anniversary One-Man Live —『MIDNIGHT DANCE AGAIN』</div>
            <div class="crt-nums">
              <span id="cd-mo">05</span><span class="crt-sep">:</span><span id="cd-d">16</span><span class="crt-sep">:</span><span id="cd-h">04</span><span class="crt-sep">:</span><span id="cd-s">00</span>
            </div>
            <div class="crt-labels">
              <div class="crt-label" style="width:5.5rem">Months</div>
              <div class="crt-label" style="width:1rem"></div>
              <div class="crt-label" style="width:4.5rem">Days</div>
              <div class="crt-label" style="width:1rem"></div>
              <div class="crt-label" style="width:4.5rem">Hours</div>
              <div class="crt-label" style="width:1rem"></div>
              <div class="crt-label" style="width:4.5rem">Seconds</div>
            </div>
            <div class="crt-date">2026.10.13 &nbsp;19:00 &nbsp;心斎橋BIGCAT</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="warning-stripe-wrap">
    <div class="warning-stripe">&nbsp;</div>
    <div class="warning-label">
      <span>// MISSION LOG OPEN //</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MISSION LOG -->
  <div class="rtb-card">
    <div class="rtb-section">
      <div class="rtb-label">Overview</div>
      <p class="rtb-overview">
        『RISE TO BIGCAT』とは…<br>
        LΩPARAが送る夢のステージへの挑戦計画。誰かの通った道をただ進むのではなく、そり立つ壁を乗り越えて這い上がっていく。RISE TO BIGCATはそんな私たちの覚悟を証明する誓いの言葉です。
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="rtb-section">
      <div class="rtb-label">Mission Log</div>
      <div class="rtb-codes">
        <div class="rtb-code-item"><span class="rtb-code">CODE 000</span><span class="rtb-code-sub">-変身-</span><span class="rtb-code-desc">セカンド衣装導入</span></div>
        <div class="rtb-code-item"><span class="rtb-code">CODE 001</span><span class="rtb-code-sub">-遭遇-</span><span class="rtb-code-desc">CITYROCK開催</span></div>
        <div class="rtb-code-item"><span class="rtb-code">CODE 002</span><span class="rtb-code-sub">-衝突-</span><span class="rtb-code-desc">3DAYS ツーマン企画『RUN IT』</span></div>
        <div class="rtb-code-item"><span class="rtb-code">CODE 003</span><span class="rtb-code-sub">-集結-</span><span class="rtb-code-desc">ツーマン翌日のワンマンライブ</span></div>
        <div class="rtb-code-item"><span class="rtb-code">CODE 004</span><span class="rtb-code-sub">-加速-</span><span class="rtb-code-desc">6月5週連続リリース</span></div>
        <div class="rtb-code-item"><span class="rtb-code">CODE 005</span><span class="rtb-code-sub">-拡張-</span><span class="rtb-code-desc">新グッズ発売</span></div>
        <div class="rtb-code-item omega"><span class="rtb-code">CODE &nbsp;Ω</span><span class="rtb-code-sub omega-sub">-突破-</span><span class="rtb-code-desc">2周年記念ワンマンライブ in BIGCAT 開催</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- BIGCAT公演情報 -->
  <div class="goal-block">
    <div class="goal-inner">
      <div class="goal-eyebrow">GOAL — 到達点</div>
      <div class="goal-title">LΩPARA 2nd Anniversary One-Man Live
        <span class="goal-live-title">『MIDNIGHT DANCE AGAIN』</span>
      </div>
      <div class="goal-meta-grid">
        <div class="gm-item">
          <span class="gm-key">DATE</span>
          <span class="gm-val">2026年10月13日（火）</span>
        </div>
        <div class="gm-item gm-venue">
          <span class="gm-key">VENUE</span>
          <span class="gm-val gm-val-venue">心斎橋BIGCAT</span>
        </div>
        <div class="gm-item">
          <span class="gm-key">OPEN</span>
          <span class="gm-val">18:30 &nbsp;/&nbsp; START 19:00</span>
        </div>
        <div class="gm-item">
          <span class="gm-key">END</span>
          <span class="gm-val">終演 20:45〜21:00</span>
        </div>
        <div class="gm-item gm-full">
          <span class="gm-key">物販</span>
          <span class="gm-val">21:30〜24:00 @CIRCUS OSAKA（1D不要）</span>
        </div>
        <div class="gm-item gm-full gm-note">
          <span class="gm-val">※全券種 入場時別途1ドリンク必須</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="goal-tickets">
        <div class="gt-card omega">
          <div class="gt-name">Ω-ticket <span class="gt-price">¥15,000</span></div>
          <ul class="gt-perks">
            <li>最優先入場</li>
            <li>限定スウェット</li>
            <li>アフターパーティー参加権</li>
            <li>限定アクリルバンクル</li>
            <li>サイン入りフォトポスター（メンバー選択可）</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="gt-card beta-t">
          <div class="gt-name">β-ticket <span class="gt-price">¥6,000</span></div>
          <ul class="gt-perks">
            <li>優先入場</li>
            <li>アフターパーティー参加権</li>
            <li>限定アクリルバンクル</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="gt-card alpha-t">
          <div class="gt-name">α-ticket <span class="gt-price">¥1,000</span></div>
          <div class="gt-badge">電子</div>
          <ul class="gt-perks">
            <li>一般入場のみ</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="gt-card alpha-plus">
          <div class="gt-name">α+-ticket <span class="gt-price">¥1,500</span></div>
          <div class="gt-badge">手売 / アクリルキーホルダー</div>
          <ul class="gt-perks">
            <li>一般入場のみ</li>
            <li>整理番号付与なし</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="gt-card invitation">
          <div class="gt-name">Invitation <span class="gt-price">¥0</span></div>
          <div class="gt-badge">画像 / 紙</div>
          <ul class="gt-perks">
            <li>招待券</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Xシェアボタン -->
  <div class="share-wrap">
    <a class="share-btn-x"
       href="https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=%E5%A4%A2%E3%81%AE%E3%82%B9%E3%83%86%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8%E3%81%B8%E3%80%81L%CE%A9PARA%E3%81%AE%E8%BB%8C%E8%B7%A1%E3%82%92%E3%81%94%E8%A6%A7%E3%81%8F%E3%81%A0%E3%81%95%E3%81%84&url=https%3A%2F%2FYOUR-URL-HERE"
       target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.244 2.25h3.308l-7.227 8.26 8.502 11.24H16.17l-4.714-6.231-5.401 6.231H2.746l7.73-8.835L1.254 2.25H8.08l4.253 5.622 5.911-5.622zm-1.161 17.52h1.833L7.084 4.126H5.117z"/></svg>
      <span>シェアする</span>
    </a>
  </div>

</section>

<footer>
  <span class="f-logo">LΩ<span>PARA</span></span>
  <span class="f-copy">© LΩPARA / 合同会社ミモロワークス</span>
</footer>

<script>
// ══ CRT NOISE ANIMATION ══
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('crtCanvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  let frame = 0;

  function resize() {
    canvas.width  = canvas.offsetWidth;
    canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;
  }
  resize();
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

  function drawNoise() {
    const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    // canvasは透明のまま（テレビ枠越しに背景が見える）
    requestAnimationFrame(drawNoise);
  }
  drawNoise();
})();

// ══ COUNTDOWN ══
const TARGET = new Date('2026-10-13T19:00:00');

function tick() {
  const now = new Date();
  if (TARGET <= now) {
    ['mo','d','h','s'].forEach(i => document.getElementById('cd-'+i).textContent='00');
    return;
  }
  const fmt = n => String(Math.floor(n)).padStart(2,'0');

  // 月数：nowから1ヶ月ずつ足してTARGETを超えるまでカウント
  let mo = 0;
  let cursor = new Date(now);
  while (true) {
    const next = new Date(cursor);
    next.setMonth(next.getMonth() + 1);
    if (next > TARGET) break;
    cursor = next;
    mo++;
  }

  // cursorからTARGETまでの残りを日・時・秒に分解
  const rest = TARGET - cursor;
  const d = Math.floor(rest / 86400000);
  const h = Math.floor((rest % 86400000) / 3600000);
  const s = Math.floor((rest % 60000) / 1000);

  document.getElementById('cd-mo').textContent = fmt(mo);
  document.getElementById('cd-d').textContent  = fmt(d);
  document.getElementById('cd-h').textContent  = fmt(h);

  const sEl = document.getElementById('cd-s');
  const sv = fmt(s);
  if (sEl.textContent !== sv) {
    sEl.classList.add('tick');
    setTimeout(()=>sEl.classList.remove('tick'),200);
    sEl.textContent = sv;
  }
}
tick(); setInterval(tick,1000);
</script>
</body>
</html>
